title: Moaning Mobs
description: This resource pack makes villagers do the Grox moan when they die
body:
Moaning Mobs is a minecraft reasorse pack that adds a new sound effect when vilagers die. When vilagers die they play the grox moan sound effect:(https://www.myinstants.com/en/instant/grox-villager-99070/). 
This allows for funny moments when goofing off with vilagers.
